name: Overseas Commerce Ltd.
summary: Overseas Commerce Ltd. provides logistics services in Israel and internationally. The company operates and manages customs- supervised container and cargo terminals; and warehouses for storing hazardous materials and products under temperature control. It also provides logistics services, such as warehousing, inventory management, value-added services, etc.; and land transport and distribution services. The company serves exporters and importers, international cargo forwarders, customs brokers, shipping companies and ship agents, and various government authorities related to the import and export processes of cargo. Overseas Commerce Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is based in Ashdod, Israel.
